header: Developers, integrators, and editors on Desiderio

testimonials.quote: Pro's early element drops mean we pitch designs with blocks our competitors don't have yet. At €49/month it's the cheapest unfair advantage in our entire toolchain.

author_image.title: Sofia Berg portrait
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.

testimonials.quote: We bought the €890 installation for our first project to learn the setup from the creators — every install since has taken us an afternoon. One seed command gives every client demo a full styleguide.

author_image.title: Daniel Okonkwo portrait
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.

testimonials.quote: After the €690 editor workshop my 12-person team stopped filing support tickets. Backend previews on all 255 elements mean we see the real layout before saving — no more publish and pray.

author_image.title: Hannah Vogel portrait
author_image.description: Unsplash portrait used as demo customer imagery.
